<?php namespace Faker\Extension; /** * @experimental This interface is experimental and does not fall under our BC promise */ interface FileExtension extends Extension { /** * Get a random MIME type * * @example 'video/avi' */ public function mimeType(): string; /** * Get a random file extension (without a dot) * * @example avi */ public function extension(): string; /** * Get a full path to a new real file on the system. */ public function filePath(): string; }
